member.name: M:BarbezDotEu.License.Generation.KeyGenerator.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String)
member.param: The expected "sum" of the key. All keys share the same "sum", which is what makes the key validatable. Negative or default values are not valid.
The desored division in between segments of the license key.

member.name: M:BarbezDotEu.License.Generation.KeyGenerator.GenerateKeys(System.UInt32,System.String[])
member.summary: Generates a number of license keys.
member.param: The amount of keys to generate.
Keys that cannot be present in the resulting key set.
